Divine InterventionAct
You asked. Something answered.
Effect
Perform a Faith check at Hard difficulty. On success, name one thing you need — the divine provides it. The GM narrates how. This cannot be used twice in the same Scene.
Crit
1 All allies gain Boost 1 on every check this beat.
ClericTier 1 · Act

Name: Commune
HTML:
CommuneAct
You ask. Something answers.
Effect
Perform a Faith check. On success:
Choose one:
What does my deity want me to do here?
What truth about this Scene am I missing?
What is the most righteous path forward?
Crit
1 Ask one additional question.
ClericTier 1 · Act

Name: Devoted Presence
HTML:
Devoted PresenceCondition
While in hand: your faith is a shield for those around you.
Effect
While this card is in hand, any ally who loses a Hit Die within your sight may immediately gain Resolve — roll a d6 and place it before their remaining Hit Dice.
Crit
1 You also gain Resolve when this triggers.

HTML:

Effect
Perform an Arcana check. On success, channel a power above your tier — describe an effect of Tier 2 magnitude. The GM adjudicates the cost.

Name: Rage
HTML:

Rage
Everything that hurts you makes you worse to face.
Fuel — Rage Pool
When you fail a Check, place those rolled dice in your Rage pool. When you take damage, place the damage dice from each hit into your Rage pool.

Immediately top-deck and play the top card of your deck — narrate how your rage shapes it. That Action gains Boost 3. Unplayable cards generate 1 Resolve. Rage pool fully clears.
Spend — Retribution
At any point, spend your entire pool for Retribution (see Card 2).

Name: Retribution
HTML:
CoreBarbarian
Retribution
They shouldn't have touched them.
React — When Ally Suffers
Spend your entire Rage pool. Roll all those dice. Keep the highest (Tier × 2) results and add them to your next Check targeting the source.
After Retribution
Rage pool resets to zero. Works in any Scene — Combat, social, exploration. The GM interprets what "targeting the source" means.
Tier 1: keep highest 2 · Tier 2: keep highest 4 · Tier 3: keep highest 6

You know these weapons. They know you.
